basis.ordering: lexicographic product over I, X, Y, Z

coefficient_convention.coefficient_formula: Sparse Pauli coefficients, with labels in matrix tensor-product order
coefficient_convention.stored_terms: Only coefficients with abs(C_P) > drop_tol are stored.

source.dense_usage: None; analytic Pauli strings are exported directly.
source.final_construction: analytic diagonal Ising problem with Z_i and nearest-neighbor Z_i Z_j terms
